Sometimes I think we should live more than a hundred years with perfect physical and mental health to get to know so many beautiful and special places that the world has to offer. Scotland is one of those romantic paradises.

Just returned to US after 6 weeks in Scotland! Starting and ended in Edinburgh! Who doesn’t love it?!!As my family history dates back to 17th century, I felt like I was walking on my own land! The music, the vistas, the people and food, but more…
Edinburgh is definitely one of the most beautiful places on earth. Highly recommend a trip there once a year to soothe the soul.
